data.title: International Seaways Updates Revolving Credit Facility Collateral Structure
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

International Seaways ( (INSW) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 27, 2026, an indirect wholly owned subsidiary of International Seaways entered into a joinder agreement to its existing $500 million revolving credit facility, becoming a subsidiary guarantor under that financing. As part of the agreement, the subsidiary pledged a VLCC tanker it owns as collateral, designating the vessel as a substitution asset replacing ships previously sold or released from the secured collateral pool, thereby maintaining the strength and continuity of the company’s borrowing base.

The move reflects International Seaways’ ongoing active management of its secured credit structure as it refreshes collateral in line with fleet changes. By substituting a modern VLCC into the facility’s collateral package, the company helps preserve access to liquidity under the revolving credit facility and supports financial flexibility for its tanker operations and capital allocation plans.

The most recent analyst rating on (INSW) stock is a Hold with a $71.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on International Seaways stock, see the INSW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on INSW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INSW is a Neutral.

The score is anchored by strong balance-sheet positioning and a very positive earnings-call outlook on cash generation and shareholder returns. These positives are tempered by a concerning TTM deterioration in revenue/margins/free cash flow and by technically overbought conditions that elevate near-term pullback risk.

To see Spark’s full report on INSW stock, click here.

More about International Seaways

International Seaways, Inc. operates in the maritime transportation industry, focusing on crude oil and petroleum product shipping through a fleet that includes very large crude carriers, or VLCC tankers. The company accesses bank financing facilities to support its fleet operations and asset management strategy in the global tanker market.

Average Trading Volume: 609,749

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.51B

data.title: CaliberCos Announces Board Transition and New Independent Director
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CaliberCos, Inc. Class A ( (CWD) ) just unveiled an update.

CaliberCos Inc., a Nasdaq-listed real estate and digital asset-focused alternative asset manager, specializes in middle-market hospitality and multifamily properties and is expanding into blockchain-enabled tokenization of real estate funds. The firm combines an institutional asset management platform with a hands-on approach to value creation in underserved markets, offering access through public equity and private funds.

On March 31, 2026, Caliber announced a planned board transition in which directors Dan Hansen and Michael Trzupek notified the company they will not stand for re-election at the May 14, 2026 annual meeting, citing expanded responsibilities in their outside executive roles and affirming no disagreements with Caliber. The board has nominated veteran asset management executive and digital asset governance specialist J. Alan Reid Jr. as an independent director and expected future Compensation Committee chair, and plans to reduce the board to five members with three independents, moves that refine oversight as the company deepens its real estate and digital asset strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (CWD) stock is a Hold with a $1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CaliberCos, Inc. Class A stock, see the CWD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CWD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CWD is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (sharp revenue drop, large losses, and renewed cash burn). Technicals are also soft with negative momentum and long-term downtrend signals. Offsetting factors include improved balance sheet messaging and strategic/fundraising progress from the earnings update and recent portfolio actions, but these have not yet translated into stronger earnings or cash generation.

To see Spark’s full report on CWD stock, click here.

More about CaliberCos, Inc. Class A

CaliberCos Inc., which trades on Nasdaq as CWD, is a real estate-focused alternative asset manager with more than $2.6 billion in assets under management and a 17-year track record in middle-market hospitality and multifamily properties. The company runs an institutional-grade, but boutique, value-focused platform targeting underserved real estate segments while also integrating digital-asset infrastructure and tokenization technology into its investment strategies.

Through investments such as LINK, the token underlying Chainlink, Caliber is implementing blockchain-based approaches to how real estate assets are financed, owned, and accessed. Investors can gain exposure to its real estate and digital-asset activities via its publicly listed shares as well as through private real estate funds aimed at accredited investors and financial professionals.

Average Trading Volume: 75,432

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $7.48M

data.title: Aptose Shareholders Approve Hanmi Acquisition and Re-Domiciling
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Aptose Biosciences ( (TSE:APS) ) has shared an announcement.

On March 31, 2026, Aptose Biosciences Inc. shareholders approved a continuance of the corporation from the Canada Business Corporations Act to the Business Corporations Act (Alberta), with more than 92 percent of votes cast in favor. This corporate re-domiciling reflects a governance shift that may streamline regulatory alignment and corporate structure for future operations.

At the same meeting, shareholders also approved a previously announced plan of arrangement under which HS North America Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary of Hanmi Pharmaceutical Co. Ltd., will acquire all Aptose common shares it does not already own or control, with nearly 85 percent of votes in favor. The strong shareholder support paves the way for Aptose to come under full Hanmi ownership, potentially altering its strategic direction, capital resources, and position within the oncology drug development landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:APS) stock is a Hold with a C$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Aptose Biosciences stock, see the TSE:APS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on APS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, APS is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by very weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing cash burn, negative equity and rising debt). Positive corporate catalysts (promising trial results and a pending acquisition) provide meaningful offset, while technical indicators are mixed-to-weak and valuation metrics are not supportive due to negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on APS stock, click here.

More about Aptose Biosciences

Aptose Biosciences Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing targeted therapies for hematologic malignancies and other cancers. The company operates in the biopharmaceutical sector, pursuing innovative oncology drug candidates for global markets in collaboration with strategic partners such as Hanmi Pharmaceutical.

data.title: Datacentrex Completes Public Offering and Capital Restructuring
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Datacentrex ( (DTCX) ) has issued an announcement.

Datacentrex, Inc. is a digital infrastructure and capital deployment company that owns and operates Scrypt-based proof-of-work compute assets, primarily hosted in third-party colocation facilities. The company monetizes this compute through hashrate marketplace mechanisms while managing a treasury of digital assets and cash to preserve capital and support opportunistic, accretive deployment across asset-backed operating businesses.

On March 31, 2026, Datacentrex closed a best-efforts public offering launched on March 26, issuing 4,510,000 common shares at $2.00 and pre-funded warrants for up to 5,575,000 additional shares at $1.99, for gross proceeds of approximately $20.2 million earmarked for working capital and general corporate purposes. The company accepted six-month issuance restrictions and insider lock-ups, while compensating placement agent Dominari Securities with cash fees, expense reimbursement and a five-year warrant for 806,800 shares, and simultaneously restructured its Series A preferred stock by formalizing on March 27 an amended conversion rate of 23 common shares per preferred share at a $2.00 reference price, reshaping its capital structure and increasing potential future dilution for common shareholders.

More about Datacentrex

Datacentrex, Inc. is a digital infrastructure and capital deployment company that owns and operates Scrypt-based proof-of-work compute assets, primarily through third-party colocation facilities. The company monetizes this compute via hashrate marketplace mechanisms while managing a treasury of digital assets and cash to preserve capital and support opportunistic, accretive deployment.

Its operating platform focuses on asset-backed businesses tied to Scrypt compute and related strategic transactions. Datacentrex’s model positions it at the intersection of digital infrastructure and crypto-oriented compute markets, with a focus on generating returns from owned hardware rather than purely financial exposure to digital assets.

On March 26, 2026, Datacentrex, Inc. entered into a placement agency agreement with Dominari Securities LLC for a best-efforts public offering of 4,510,000 common shares at $2.00 each and pre-funded warrants for up to 5,575,000 additional shares at $1.99 per warrant. The offering, conducted under an effective shelf registration, closed on March 31, 2026, raising approximately $20.2 million in gross proceeds for working capital and general corporate purposes.

To support the transaction, Datacentrex agreed to a six-month restriction on issuing additional equity or equity-linked securities, while its officers and directors, including CFO Robert Steele under a tailored lock-up, entered six-month lock-up agreements, limiting insider sales. Dominari received cash fees totaling 9% of investor proceeds plus expense reimbursement and a five-year warrant to purchase 806,800 shares at $2.00, aligning compensation with Datacentrex’s future equity performance.

Concurrently, on March 26, 2026, Datacentrex secured a waiver and amendment from holders of its Series A Preferred Convertible Voting Stock, preventing an automatic anti-dilution adjustment that would have been triggered by the offering. The company instead agreed to change the Series A conversion terms, increasing the conversion rate from 15 to 23 common shares per preferred share and lowering the reference price from $3.00 to $2.00 per common share.

The revised preferred terms were formalized on March 27, 2026, via a Second Amended and Restated Certificate of Designation filed with the Nevada Secretary of State, embedding the new conversion rate and reference price into the security’s governing documents. Taken together, the equity raise and preferred stock changes recalibrate Datacentrex’s capital structure, providing fresh liquidity at the cost of potential future dilution for common shareholders while maintaining preferred holders’ economics at the new lower valuation level.

Average Trading Volume: 460,955

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $70.6M

For a thorough assessment of DTCX stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NewPeak to launch key drilling campaign at Las Opeñas gold project
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

NewPeak Metals Ltd. ( (AU:NPM) ) has shared an announcement.

NewPeak Metals plans to start a minimum 2,500m diamond drilling program in late April at its 100% owned Las Opeñas Gold Project in San Juan, Argentina, after securing local contractor Ecominera and completing camp and access works. Located on key structural trends of the El Indio Belt and supported by historic broad gold-silver-polymetallic intercepts, Las Opeñas is being targeted as a potential large-scale, bulk-tonnage epithermal system that could materially enhance NewPeak’s asset base and valuation.

Management says the program is designed to systematically test breccia-hosted mineralisation with the option to expand drilling, underscoring confidence in a major gold-dominant discovery. The company also expects assay results this month from recent drilling at its Tansey Gold Project in southeast Queensland, adding near-term exploration catalysts that could influence NewPeak’s growth trajectory and shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NPM) stock is a Hold with a A$0.02 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NewPeak Metals Ltd. stock, see the AU:NPM Stock Forecast page.

More about NewPeak Metals Ltd.

NewPeak Metals Ltd. is an exploration-focused mining company developing gold projects in Argentina and Australia. Its flagship Las Opeñas Gold Project sits in San Juan Province on the El Indio Belt, a prolific South American gold district that also hosts Barrick and Shandong’s multi-million-ounce Veladero and Pascua-Lama deposits, positioning NewPeak in a tier-one geological setting.

Average Trading Volume: 883,697

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$4.94M

Perenti Global ( (AU:PRN) ) has provided an announcement.

Perenti has appointed Dr Vanessa Torres as its new managing director and chief executive, succeeding Mark Norwell as part of a planned leadership transition. Torres, a former South32 chief operating officer with more than 25 years of experience at major miners including BHP and Vale, will join the company in April and assume the top role in June, with Norwell staying on to support the handover.

The board said Torres was chosen after an extensive global search to build on the fourfold revenue growth and operational improvements delivered under Norwell’s tenure. Her appointment, supported by a substantial remuneration and incentive package tied to long- and short-term performance, is intended to advance Perenti’s strategy of developing a fully diversified portfolio and driving sustainable long-term growth for shareholders and other stakeholders.

data.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Files 40-F and Sets May 8 Hybrid Shareholder Meeting
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 50% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Wheaton Precious Metals ( (TSE:WPM) ) is now available.

Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. announced on March 31, 2026 that it has filed its Form 40-F with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, making the report and its audited 2025 financial statements available on EDGAR and the company’s website. Shareholders can obtain printed copies of the audited financials free of charge upon request to the investor relations department.

The company also set May 8, 2026 for its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders, to be held in a hybrid format with an in-person venue in New York and a virtual platform that allows registered shareholders and proxyholders to listen and vote online in real time. The move underscores Wheaton’s push for broader shareholder participation and transparency as it reports on its 2025 performance and governance matters.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:WPM) stock is a Buy with a C$193.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Wheaton Precious Metals stock, see the TSE:WPM Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WPM is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by standout profitability and a fortress-like balance sheet, reinforced by a strongly positive earnings update with clear long-term growth targets. Offsetting factors are a premium valuation with a low dividend yield and a mixed near-term technical picture, plus noted variability in free cash flow conversion.

To see Spark’s full report on WPM stock, click here.

More about Wheaton Precious Metals

Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. is a leading precious metals streaming company, focusing on long-life, low-cost gold and silver assets.
